message:
Add 60+ new beads for comprehensive plan coverage

New beads include:
- Inference engine: robust statistics, copulas, streaming sketches, wavelets, DPMM, BMA, PPC, submodular selection, KL divergence, Chernoff bounds, martingale bounds, graph-regularized classification, renewal reward, CVaR, composite hypothesis, Wonham filter, restless bandits, experimental design, semi-Markov hazards, Lévy subordinators, robust Bayes, causal intervention, coupled tree priors, POMDP, credible bounds, PAC-Bayes, empirical Bayes, minimax regret, time-to-decision, marked point processes, Beta-Stacy survival, optimal transport, conformal prediction
- Decision theory: queueing thresholds (Erlang-C), dependency-weighted loss, active sensing (VOI), Whittle/VOI index policy, goal-oriented resource recovery
- Supervisor detection: PM2, supervisord, nodemon/forever, tmux/screen, nohup/disown
- Phase 1 items: durable session model, capabilities cache, golden path defaults, dormant daemon, inbox contract
- Comprehensive tests: Parquet schema stability, batched writes, DuckDB views, redaction compliance, offline reports, E2E integration, Bayesian inference, safety gates, agent CLI contract

Added 55+ dependencies to create proper execution graph structure.

Total beads: 351 (up from 291)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
